model.name: Music Stable Audio 3 Medium
model.description: Higher-capacity general audio model for longer music, cinematic beds, evolving textures, and detailed sound design up to 380 seconds. Stronger than the Small variants for fidelity, long-range structure, and mixed music/SFX prompts. This Medimum version requires Flash Attention 2 to work.

prompt: A polished cinematic electronic track with shimmering arpeggios, deep sub bass, wide drums, and evolving atmospheric pads.
